South Kazakh Medical Academy, Kazakhstan

South Kazakh Medical Academy (SKMA) is a public research university that is situated in Shymkent, Kazakhstan. Founded in 1979, the academy has become one of the leading which offers numerous undergraduate and postgraduate programs in General Medicine, Dentistry, Pharmacy and Nursing.

# Kazakhstan

South Kazakh Medical Academy, Kazakhstan

South Kazakh Medical Academy (SKMA) is a public research university that is situated in Shymkent, Kazakhstan. Founded in 1979, the academy has become one of the leading which offers numerous undergraduate and postgraduate programs in General Medicine, Dentistry, Pharmacy and Nursing. South Kazakh Medical Academy in Shymkent is a state institution accredited by the Ministry of education and science of the Republic of Kazakhstan, which assures good quality education, experienced teachers, and finest infrastructure.

The University has a moderate research focus that is facilitated by the over 10,000 scientific publications contributed to international journals by SKMA faculty members. SKMA emphasizes equal importance of sports and arts as extracurricular activities for their students. The Academy has well developed modern refractories, including laboratories, clinical centers, and libraries. Moreover, SKMA has low tuition fees and provides hospitable atmosphere for foreign students. The campus is multicultural and offers various student support services. It is also affordable to international students as the prior degree offer provides students with the opportunity to practice medicine abroad after graduation.

Why Choose South Kazakh Medical Academy, Kazakhstan?

The South Kazakh Medical Academy is an institution for engineering and medicine. It provides an incredible chance to candidates for healthcare professions in both domestic and foreign students, with an emphasis on high-quality education, modern research facilities, and international environment.

High-Quality Education

South Kazakh Medical Academy (SKMA) is one of the best under medical universities in Kazakhstan and it has a well-developed trained curriculum with both theoretical and practical courses taught by highly qualified educators. Today’s standard of education in South Kazakh Medical Academy is good. Its programs are approved by the Ministry of Education and Science of Kazakhstan, which guarantees meeting basic benchmarks of academic quality.

Focus on Research and Innovation

SKMA have developed numerous new scientific researches and clinical studies over the years. Medical research SKMA considered is fundamental by the other member of faculty. Their contribution to the world medicine is over 10 000 scientific papers in international journals.

International Recognition

It is possible to work in many countries, such as the USA, U.K, and Canada, on a degree from SKMA because the medical degree SKMA offers is portable. A significant number of students from various countries studying at the university is welcoming to its status.

Affordable Tuition Fees 

Compared to a number of other medical universities payment SKMA charges is low. This creates a more welcoming atmosphere for foreign students who want high standard education at a low price.

Modern Infrastructure

Students carry out academic and research activities using the best resources possible. Advanced laboratories, clinical training centers, and extensive libraries are just a few of the facilities offered by the university.

Multicultural Environment

Students from different parts of the globe bring a colorful cultural diversity to the SKMA student body. This exposure goes a long way in enabling the students to appreciate different cultures and develop a global outlook.

Extracurricular Activities and Student Clubs

In addition to academic clubs, SKMA has a variety of cultural, musical, and sports clubs to encourage the students to lead a balanced life. This promotes personal growth and development alongside academic achievements.

Student Support Services

The university’s student support services are exceptional and include academic and career counseling, as well as assistance for international students. Students are well taken care of during their academic journey.

Whatever other medical institution you may select, South Kazakh Medical Academy will be your foremost option if you are in search of an impressive medical institution with high-quality education, proper research facilities, and a hospitable environment fitting for international students.

Eligibility Criteria To Study At South Kazakh Medical Academy, Kazakhstan

The South Kazakh Medical University (SKMU) has the following requirements which applicants need to satisfy in order to gain admission to the academy.

NEET Qualification

Students wishing to enroll SKMU must have qualified the NEET exam and are required to provide evidence of passing the same in the application.

English Proficiency

TOEFL score of 60 or an IELTS score of 5.5 is necessary to proving that the applicant speaks English as a foreign language.

Age Requirement

An applicant must be more than 17 years and less than 25 years as on the day the classes commence.

Educational Qualification

The applicant is required to have completed high school or its equivalent with good grades in core science subjects of Physics, Chemistry and Biology (PCB).

As long as a student meets these criterias, they will be eligible to enroll SKMU for MBBS and other medical programs.

Hostel Facilities At South Kazakh Medical Academy, Kazakhstan

South Kazakh Medical Academy (SKMA) aims to ensure that its students are comfortable by providing appropriate accommodation facilities within the University premises. The hostels are situated on the university grounds, which gives students easy access to classes, laboratories, and other university amenities. Outlined below are pertinent details on the available hostel facilities.

Boys and Girls Hostels are Separate

SKMA provides hostels for both male and female students, this helps in safeguarding the privacy of all the residents.

Rooms are Furnished

The furnished rooms are shared, and normally have 2-3 students per room. All of the rooms have basic living’s such as beds, desks, chairs, and wardrobes and in addition to that, comfortable living space.

Common Rooms

The hostels also have common areas which the learners can use to rest, carry out group studies, or even interact with fellow students to foster community feeling.

Other Facilities

Reading Room: For quiet study time.

Dining Room and Canteen: Meals and other healthy available at reasonable prices.

Auditorium: for hosting events, activities and meeting.

These facilities promote positive working habits together with a good balance between academic work and leisure.

Student life At South Kazakh Medical Academy, Kazakhstan

Life as a student at the South Kazakh Medical Academy (SKMA) is colorful, multifaceted, full of personal and scientific potential, and skills to be developed. The university supports every student internationally, through friendly and respectful attitude toward everyone. A few important notes to highlight with regard to student life at SKMA are as follows:

Multicultural Environment

The atmosphere on the campus SKMA is rich with students from different countries, thus giving it a multicultural character. This multicultural setting enhances the educational atmosphere and encourages international relations among students of various cultures.

Extracurricular Activities

Students of SKMA have different kinds of extracurricular activities to choose from. There are of sports, music and art, cultural, and socially service activities. These activities broaden the communication agenda of their participants, enable them to make new friends, and support a healthy lifestyle.

Student Government and Clubs

The university has student government organizations which deal with affairs of the student body. These groups deal with enhancement of student living conditions on the campus by arranging events and student activities. Likewise, there are several other known clubs and associations besides the academic ones, which students are free to join.

Social Events and Cultural Activities

Social and cultural activities, including sightseeing tours, are arranged on a regular basis by SKMA. Such events serve to enable students respite from the mundane aspects of academic life and experience different cultures and community enhances participatory involvement on campus.

Support Services

In order to further enhance students’ overall well-being, SKMA has set up support services which are customized and integrated. Academic career counseling, guidance, and even mental health services foresight actively assist students towards attaining success.

In general, at South Kazakh Medical Academy, student life is diversified and in the aspect of particularly developing, enriched students are offered the opportunity to combine academic study, personal development, and cultural integration.

Ranking of South Kazakh Medical Academy, Kazakhstan

Reputation and ranking of South Kazakhstan Medical Academy is advanced compared to other institutions, not only in Kazakhstan but also worldwide. As for the schools of medicine and surgery, the institution is among the leaders in Kazakhstan. The ranking of South Kazakhstan Medical Academy is:

11th in the country (Kazakhstan) , 4751st in the world

This informative represents South Kazakhstan Medical Academy’s prominence in a wide spectrum of medical education in Kazakhstan as a foremost academic institution with strong research and great impact on the development of medicine globally.

Advantages of Studying At South Kazakh Medical Academy, Kazakhstan

South Kazakh Medical Academy has many further benefits for learners with a modern point of view and top notch learning facilities which are affordable for everyone.

High Quality Education

Students are assured that they will receive the best education because South Kazakh Medical Academy (SKMA) has very demanding and detailed academic syllabus. The university is accredited with the Ministry of Education and Science of Kazakhstan which gives SKMA’s programs a mark of quality assurance.

Affordable Tuition Fees

SKMA offers medical education at low tuition cost relative to most other institutions globally which makes it a great option for international students wanting to seek quality medical education.

International Recognition

SKMA medical degree qualifies for practice in most countries including US, UK, Canada and Kosovo which is a great opportunity for graduates to venture into international waters.

Modern Infrastructure and Facilities

The university has up to date facilities such as modern laboratories, clinical training centers and well resourced libraries. These enables learners to carry out their academic, research and clinical training activities.

Concentration on Development and Research

SKMA faculties have actively published scientific papers and are engaged in modern medical research, which augments the students’ knowledge in the field of medicine. SKMA places a strong emphasis on research and innovation.

Multicultural Environment

Students from different parts of the globe studying at SKMA are able to gain much exposure through a multiculturally integrated educational setup which SKMA aims at. This aids students in broadening their outlook and helps them build relationships with students from different cultures.

Extracurricular Opportunities

The university also offers a variety of extracurricular clubs, including sports, music and cultural activities. All these activities aim at enhancing the personality and social skills of the students for them to become better integrated members of society.

Student Support Services

Beside counseling SKMA offers career counseling and mental health support, contributing to the overall welfare of students and positively affecting their chances of succeeding in their studies and future employment.

With affordable fee structures, international recognition, modern facilities, and vibrant student life, South Kazakh Medical Academy is a great choice for studying medicine.

Placement At South Kazakh Medical Academy, Kazakhstan

South Kazakh Medical Academy (SKMA) provides students with great assistance during their transition from academic life to attending the workplace. The university placement activities aim at providing the students with essential skills for their consideration in the medical field. Here are some important details of the placement procedure at SKMA:

Trustworthy Organization in Healthcare

SKMA has an excellent reputation with employers, especially within the healthcare field. SKMA graduates are regarded for their solid clinical skills, considerable academic knowledge, and willingness to give high-quality services which make them attractive candidates for a wide range of medical employment.

Clinical Rotations and Internships

SKMA maintains agreements with a number of hospitals and other healthcare institutions where students perform their clinical rotations. These practices enhance students’ exposure to medicine and enable them to use the concepts learned in class.

Networking Opportunities

During their clinical training, students come in contact with other doctors which is helpful in creating networks that may be of assistance when seeking jobs. A number of graduates get employment in the hospitals or clinics where they had their internship.

International Opportunities

Graduates of SKMA can practice medicine in different countries as its medical degree is accepted worldwide. This acknowledgement enables them to work in many countries including USA, UK, Canada, and European countries.

Career Services and Support

The university offers career guidance and organizes employment services to help students secure jobs after graduating. These include job fairs, resume crafting sessions, and interviews to assist students in landing a job.

Post-Graduate Opportunities

SKMA alumni opt for post graduate medical studies or specialist training. The academy is supportive of students who wish to undertake research and offers them a solid academic base to ensure they succeed in their postgraduate medical education.

With all the required infrastructure and supports in place, South Kazakh Medical Academy aims to provide its students with all the necessary skills and hands on experience needed to succeed in the medical field.

Education Loan for Indian Students

For any Indian student wishing to attend South Kazakh Medical Academy, there’s an option for an education loan to cover the tuition fees, living expenses and other related costs. Students with dreams of pursuing MBBS and other overseas medical programs no longer have to worry thanks to the availability of education loans. Below is a summary of the procedures involved in acquiring an education loan.

Eligibility Criteria

In order to qualify for an education loan, students must satisfy these general criteria:

Applicants who are at least 18 years of age must have enrolled in a recognized foreign institution.

Education level requirements include passing all key subjects pertaining to the chosen field of study.

The parent or guardian’s financial standing will be evaluated as they will be required to act as co-signers.

Required Documents

Common documents needed for education loan applications include:

  • NEET scorecard
  • Admission letter from the university
  • Proof of academic qualifications (high school or equivalent)
  • University fee structure and expenses breakdown
  • Documentary proof of parents’ income and other financial requirements
  • Proof of identity
  • Loan Amount

The amount of loan a student can apply for is determined by the university and the coursework. The majority of banks provide loans covering costs associated with tuition, living expenses, travel, and even purchasing books and other study materials.

Terms of Repayment

Education loans usually come with a lenient repayment structure. After completing the course, there is a grace period before payments must begin, and the loan’s interest rate depends on the lender. Payments can be made over a number of years for students to afford it.

Types of Loans

Secured Loan: These loans need collateral such as land, real estate, fixed deposits, or other valuables which serve as the guarantee.

Unsecured Loan: These types of loans don’t need collateral. They usually have a higher interest rate and tighter requirements for qualification.

Loan Providers

A wide variety of banks, non-bank financial institutions, and government initiatives grant education loans, including:

  • State Bank of India (SBI)
  • HDFC Bank
  • Punjab National Bank (PNB)
  • Canara Bank
  • Government of India education loan schemes (ex. Vidya Lakshmi)

At Atlas Mentor, we help students successfully go through the process of applying for an educational loan by assisting with documents, applications, and providing support so the entire process is smooth and effortless.

FAQs On South Kazakh Medical Academy, Kazakhstan

South Kazakh Medical Academy (SKMA) is a leading medical university that attracts students from across the world. If you’re considering studying at SKMA, here are answers to some common questions:

What programs are offered at South Kazakh Medical Academy?

SKMA offers a variety of medical programs, including undergraduate degrees in General Medicine, Dentistry, Pharmacy, and Nursing. The university also provides postgraduate programs in various medical specialties.

What is the medium of instruction at South Kazakh Medical Academy?

The medium of instruction at SKMA is English, making it accessible for international students, particularly those from non-Russian speaking countries.

What are the eligibility criteria for admission to SKMA?

To apply to SKMA, students must have passed the NEET exam, meet the required age and educational qualifications, and demonstrate English proficiency through TOEFL or IELTS scores.

Is South Kazakh Medical Academy recognized internationally?

Yes, SKMA is internationally recognized, with its medical degree acknowledged in countries like the United States, United Kingdom, Canada, and several others, allowing graduates to practice medicine globally.

What are the hostel facilities like at South Kazakh Medical Academy?

SKMA offers well-equipped hostels with separate accommodations for boys and girls. The rooms are shared and furnished with essential amenities, and the hostels also provide common areas for students to relax and socialize.

These FAQs should help you get a clearer picture of life and studies at South Kazakh Medical Academy. If you have more questions, feel free to reach out!
